GeneDef.label: obsession
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have a strong psychic bond with their children. Upon death, part of their personality and memories is passed on to one random offspring.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Upon death, replaces the <color=#8a8ae6>backstory, skills, and traits</color> of one random offspring.
If the <color=#8a8ae6>target pawn</color> is not an <color=#8a8ae6>adult</color>, only skills are replaced.
The target pawn must belong to the <color=#8a8ae6>player's faction</color> and be on the <color=#8a8ae6>same map</color> as the deceased.
The target pawn must be older than the baby.
